mapper.select: select template_id, template_name, report_type, sections, data_scope, style_config, version_no, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from nc_report_template where template_id = #{templateId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into nc_report_template (template_name, report_type, sections, data_scope, style_config, version_no, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{templateName}, #{reportType}, #{sections}, #{dataScope}, #{styleConfig}, #{versionNo}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})
mapper.select: select t.task_id, t.task_name, t.template_id, coalesce(p.template_name, t.template_name) as template_name, t.report_period, t.report_scope, t.generate_mode, t.task_status, t.generated_file_name, t.generated_word_file_name, t.generated_excel_file_name, t.template_version, t.generated_by, t.snapshot_content, t.generated_time, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, t.remark from nc_report_generation_task t left join nc_report_template p on p.template_id = t.template_id where t.task_id = #{taskId} and t.del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into nc_report_generation_task (task_name, template_id, template_name, report_period, report_scope, generate_mode, task_status, generated_file_name, generated_word_file_name, generated_excel_file_name, template_version, generated_by, snapshot_content, generated_time, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{taskName}, #{templateId}, #{templateName}, #{reportPeriod}, #{reportScope}, #{generateMode}, #{taskStatus}, #{generatedFileName}, #{generatedWordFileName}, #{generatedExcelFileName}, #{templateVersion}, #{generatedBy}, #{snapshotContent}, #{generatedTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})
mapper.select: select snapshot_id, task_id, task_name, template_name, report_period, report_scope, generated_word_file_name, generated_excel_file_name, template_version, generated_by, snapshot_content, generated_time, create_by, create_time, remark from nc_report_generation_snapshot where task_id = #{taskId} order by generated_time desc, snapshot_id desc

select snapshot_id, task_id, task_name, template_name, report_period, report_scope, generated_word_file_name, generated_excel_file_name, template_version, generated_by, snapshot_content, generated_time, create_by, create_time, remark from nc_report_generation_snapshot where snapshot_id = #{snapshotId}
mapper.insert: insert into nc_report_generation_snapshot (task_id, task_name, template_name, report_period, report_scope, generated_word_file_name, generated_excel_file_name, template_version, generated_by, snapshot_content, generated_time, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{taskId}, #{taskName}, #{templateName}, #{reportPeriod}, #{reportScope}, #{generatedWordFileName}, #{generatedExcelFileName}, #{templateVersion}, #{generatedBy}, #{snapshotContent}, #{generatedTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})
mapper.select:
select count(1) from nc_fusion_indicator where del_flag = '0'
and indicator_id = #{scopeIndicatorId}
